overall.description: A character in dark clothing runs through a snowy, foggy mountain landscape at night, carrying a lantern. The footage is from a video game (likely Elden Ring), showing third-person perspective as the character navigates through rocky corridors and open snow fields under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain pass between rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: running through deep snow in a narrow rocky corridor, holding a lantern that illuminates the path ahead

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation covered in snow, forming the left wall of the narrow pass
snow-covered rock wall on the right side of the path
deep snow covering the ground, illuminated by the character's lantern
dark night sky with visible stars through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow, enclosed mountain pass with rocky walls on both sides. The ground is covered in deep snow, and the character's lantern casts a warm glow on the path ahead. The night sky is partially visible above the rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered slope with scattered bushes and small trees

events.description: exiting narrow rocky corridor into area with snow-covered vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: running past snow-covered bushes and small trees, maintaining steady pace through the snow

entered.detail: snow-laden bushes and small vegetation on the left side of the path
sparse snow-covered trees lining the right side of the slope

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up slightly as the character moves through an area with snow-covered vegetation. The rocky walls give way to bushes and small trees blanketed in snow. The character continues running forward through the deepening snow.

events.description: re-entering rocky terrain with winding narrow path between outcrops

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain, running between snow-covered rock formations

entered.detail: large snow-covered rock formation on the left side of the winding path
rocky wall on the right side creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character returns to a more enclosed rocky area, running through a winding path between snow-covered outcrops. The vegetation disappears as the terrain becomes more rugged and mountainous. The lantern light reflects off the snow between the rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field under starry night sky

events.description: emerging from rocky area into wide open snow field with expansive sky view

agents.ego_description: running across open snow field, lantern light illuminating the path ahead under the starry sky

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the far distance
expansive flat snow-covered terrain stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide-open snow field with an expansive view of the starry night sky. The rocky terrain falls away, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. The character continues running across the open snow, the lantern casting a small pool of light in the vast dark landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a claustrophobic mountain pass into a vast, open snowy wilderness under a starry night. It begins within a narrow corridor of rocky walls where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow across the deep snow. As the character pushes forward, the rocky cliffs give way to patches of snow-covered vegetation and small trees before the path winds back into a rugged area of steep, frozen outcrops. The scene then expands dramatically as the character emerges from the rocks into a wide-open snow field, revealing a distant mountain horizon and an expansive sky. Finally, the camera tracks the figure as they run across the immense, dark landscape, with the lantern providing a solitary pool of light against the surrounding void.
